svg.title: PJ3 — Container platform with GitHub Actions CI/CD
svg.desc: GitHub Actions builds container images → pushes to ECR + uploads artifacts to S3 → registers new TaskDef revision → updates ECS service; traffic flows Route 53 → ALB → Fargate tasks, egress via NAT, monitored by CloudWatch.
svg.text: PJ3 — Container platform · GitHub Actions CI/CD
OIDC federation · GHA → ECR + S3 Artifact · RegisterTaskDef → UpdateService · Route 53 → ALB → Fargate (NAT for egress) · CW Alarm → SNS
